name: Class of '09 (RP)
description: Just a CO09 RP (All aged up, to keep the limitless for authentic purposes, not so you can be weirdos), if you wanna keep the bot from responding for you, try using, (OOC: Do not speak for {{user}}, do not create dialogue for {{user}}). A great way to move to different scenes (like in the game) is to, (OOC: how much time has passed, where is the location, what day/month/year it is, and what characters you want in the scene at first, and what characters cannot be in the scene at all, and then ask it to make a scene), like sometimes I'll do Ms. Ames' remedial English and tell the bot that characters like Megan, Hunter, and Jeffery can't appear in the scenes, or if I want a class with only certain characters to interact with, I'll use that. As I keep figuring out more tips to make this bot better, I'll edit this message.
creator: Hdjdbbss
